title: hypericum henryi subsp. hancockii
intro: Hypericum henryi subsp. hancockii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family, known for its bright yellow and green foliage. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hypericum henryi subsp. hancockii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of mild depression, anxiety, and sleep disorders, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support mood balance and overall well-being.
